generated_oml:
instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for the 1/10-scale teleoperated vehicle system in Adaptive Cruise Control domain with resource-constrained ECUs"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity handling sensor/actuator data pre-processing and Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking functions"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity managing data processing and control mechanisms via ROS2 nodes"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity containing split User Interface FE (3D Visualization and Control Panel components)"
]

instance LidarSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for vehicle environment perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLidarPointCloudData
]

instance RawLidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarSensor
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP from physical to digital twin"
]

instance ProcessedPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud data processed by Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking component"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLidarPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Data Translation component serializing, aligning, and converting vehicle state information, object tracks, and projected driving path data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, object tracks, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offloading ACC system computations (lead vehicle detection, desired speed computation, actuation commands) from vehicle ECUs to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionAction, DesiredSpeedComputationAction, ActuationCommandGenerationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling remote operators to enable/disable ACC, set speed, and send emergency braking commands via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state data and object tracks"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving collected data for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating detailed reports from collected data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Detecting lead vehicles using offloaded computation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DesiredSpeedComputationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computing desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuationCommandGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating actuation commands for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disabling ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting target speed for ACC remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending emergency braking command remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the ACC Controlling FE are serialized by the Data Translation component and transmitted via UDP over Wi-Fi to the Actuation FE for motor and steering servo actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, constrained by hardware limitations. This temporal granularity ensures synchronized operation across physical and digital components, with time scales tailored to real-time processing needs."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Key deviations include the Physical Twin Entity, which hosts general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) instead of the standard OME, and the User Interface FE split into visualization and control panel components. Resource management is coordinated through ROS2-based communication across hardware-deployed entities, with strict 100 ms clock synchronization ensuring temporal alignment for safety-critical operations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 is used for internal software component communication, while inter-entity communication between physical and digital components occurs over Wi-Fi using UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The standard defines an entity-based reference architecture comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Interoperability is facilitated through protocols such as OPC Unified Architecture for implementing Functional Entities, though the standard does not specify implementation methods for FEs."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "ISO 26262-1:2018 defines functional safety requirements for road vehicles, including hazard analysis, risk assessment, safety goals, and Automotive Safety Integrity Levels (ASIL) classification. 3GPP TS 22.185 specifies security requirements for V2X services, including message authentication, encryption, and secure key management protocols to ensure communication integrity and confidentiality."
]
